title: How to Create Winning Freelance Proposals? (Ready AI Pipeline)
summary: The video demonstrates Venngage's AI Proposal Generator tool for creating branded freelance proposals from a single prompt. It covers workflow stages including prompt input, refinement with Brand Kit and AI Writing Assistant, accessibility checking, and PDF export for client delivery.
